title: Howard Camp
compiled_truth: Howard Camp is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-06-12), Howard Camp sent 11 and received 211 emails, totalling 222 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (10), [Rita Wynne](people/rita-wynne) (7), [Clem Cernosek](people/clem-cernosek) (5), [Ami Chokshi](people/ami-chokshi) (4), [Jackie Young](people/jackie-young) (4).
